# STRAT.050 ? Circle Process

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** conflict_resolution
**Domain:** CONFLICT_RESOLUTION
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Equal voice; talking piece; consensus; communal space; values-based; story-sharing; ceremonial elements; respect

## Application
Create circle; use talking piece; equal participation; share stories; seek consensus; honor values; ceremonial opening/closing; respect all

## Key Values
- Equal voice
- Story sharing
- Consensus
- Respect
- Community
